title: bouteloua hirsuta var. glandulosa
intro: Bouteloua hirsuta var. glandulosa, also known as silverblue grama, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Bouteloua hirsuta var. glandulosa include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
